line_items.description: Room 1 — ULTIMATE LUXURY: Custom Layered Treatment

terms: 50% deposit required. Balance due upon completion.

recommendations: The Roman shades in a soft beige linen would provide a clean, tailored look that complements the transitional style of the room. When raised, they would stack neatly at the top, allowing full light to flood the room. When lowered, they offer a soft, diffused light, creating a cozy atmosphere while maintaining privacy.

This option is budget-conscious yet luxurious, offering a timeless look that enhances the room's light and airy feel. The linen fabric adds texture without overwhelming the space, and the privacy lining ensures daytime privacy without blocking all light.

windows.name: DESIGNER'S CHOICE
windows.notes: silk blend with subtle pattern — elegant. sheer curtains, drapery panels

recommendations: This treatment features sheer white curtains that hang gracefully from the ceiling to the floor, allowing light to filter through softly. Overlaid are silk blend drapery panels with a subtle pattern in charcoal, adding depth and sophistication. The blackout lining with interlining ensures complete privacy and insulation, while the wrought iron rods add a touch of elegance and contrast to the soft fabrics.

This mid-range luxury option adds layers of texture and light control, enhancing the room's elegance. The combination of sheer and patterned fabric provides both functionality and visual interest, creating a luxurious yet inviting space.

windows.name: ULTIMATE LUXURY
windows.notes: velvet with designer prints — opulent. motorized sheer curtains, motorized drapery panels, custom cornice

recommendations: The ultimate luxury treatment includes motorized sheer curtains in a delicate white silk, which can be adjusted with ease to control light softly. Over these, luxurious velvet drapery panels in a designer print of charcoal and soft beige drape elegantly, pooling slightly on the floor for a dramatic effect. A custom cornice box, upholstered in the same velvet, crowns the window, adding a statement piece. The hand-forged iron rods with crystal finials provide a sparkling touch, enhancing the room's opulence. The blackout lining with thermal interlining ensures maximum privacy, light control, and energy efficiency.

This premium option creates a statement of luxury and sophistication, with every detail meticulously chosen to elevate the room's aesthetic. The motorization adds modern convenience, while the rich fabrics and custom hardware provide an unparalleled level of luxury, making the bedroom a true retreat.

generalRecommendations: Consider the room's function as a bedroom when choosing treatments; privacy and light control are key.
Ensure treatments are in harmony with the existing decor to maintain a cohesive look.
Incorporate elements that can be easily adjusted for different times of day or seasons.
ai_mockups.notes: Given the bright light exposure and the need for privacy in a bedroom setting, these treatments balance aesthetics with functionality. The proposed styles align with the transitional decor, enhancing the room's elegance while providing practical solutions for light and privacy.
